title: psychotria stricta
intro: Psychotria stricta, also known as the 'Stricter', is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, where it has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The leaves of the Psychotria stricta plant have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to have potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
